quotes.text: Third class interface... not at all user friendly. Even when there is high speed internet available, the app doesn't work saying "No internet".
too much pricing switching to another operator. maket order also they are tkaing price 118 too much for everything. link you adhar 118 lol 😆
Groww is froud app, chart go positive side and call option price go negative side, due to this I lost 300K in 2 month, don't install this app

action_ideas: Improve app stability and network connectivity handling to prevent "No internet" errors and enhance overall user interface responsiveness.
Review and clearly communicate all fees, especially for market orders and [REDACTED], to improve pricing transparency.
Investigate and resolve discrepancies between chart movements and option prices to ensure accurate real-time trading data.
